data: Power lifting and general fitness is a challenging competition conducted in Meraz for this year for all college and university students in Chhattisgarh. This competition provides a platform to showcase your strength and break some PR’s. We will have bench-press , deadlift and pull-up challenges and participants can participate individually. Every person is encouraged to engage and contribute in a setting that fosters equal opportunities and prevents any form of discrimination.
Strength Unleashed: Where Power Meets Passion
